instruments.title: INSTRUMENTS
instruments.manual.title: USAGE CARD — INSTRUMENTS
instruments.manual.line1: ARCHÉ translates urban relations into signal.
instruments.manual.line3: Gradient reading: signal rises as alignment becomes precise.
instruments.manual.line4: When a place is recognized, a reading becomes available.
instruments.usage.meridian: Measures your relation to the meridian axis: proximity, hold, site recognition.
instruments.usage.depth: Calibrates a vertical reading: depth, voids, strata. (Calibrating)
instruments.usage.coherence: Calibrates movement coherence: stability, continuity, friction. (Calibrating)
